MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.title: Dream Interpretation
MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.descriptio: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards (excluding [gold]The World[/gold]) and add it to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show:|\nIt gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold].}
MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.selectionS: Choose a Tarot card to add to your hand.
MANOSABA-STRIKE_JOGASAKI_NOAH.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_JOGASAKI_NOAH.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_JOGASAKI_NOAH.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-PALETTE.title: Palette
MANOSABA-PALETTE.description: Randomly generate {Repeat:diff()} paint orbs from [gold]Red, Yellow, and Blue[/gold].
MANOSABA-STILL.title: Still Frame
MANOSABA-STILL.description: Paint the target monster and summon an allied copy of it. (Cannot paint Elites or Bosses.)
MANOSABA-GOOD_SLEEP.title: A Good Night's Sleep?
MANOSABA-WELL_SLEEP.title: I Slept Like a Log
MANOSABA-DEATH_LOOP.title: Death Loop
MANOSABA-FLUX.title: Flux
MANOSABA-PICNIC_TIME.title: Picnic Time
MANOSABA-PICNIC_TIME.description: Draw {Cards} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your next turn.
MANOSABA-LABOURS_OF_HIRO.title: Labours of Hiro
MANOSABA-TRIAL_START.title: Witch Trial
MANOSABA-VOTE.title: Accuse
MANOSABA-VOTE.description: Draw {Cards} cards and apply {VotePower} [gold]Suspicion[/gold] to the target.
MANOSABA-PERJURY.title: Perjury
MANOSABA-PERJURY.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have [gold]Suspicion[/gold], spend {VotePowerCost} [gold]Suspicion[/gold] to gain an extra {ExtraBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-RONPA_NIKAIDO_HIRO.title: Rebuttal
MANOSABA-RONPA_NIKAIDO_HIRO.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. If you have [gold]Suspicion[/gold], spend {VotePowerCost} [gold]Suspicion[/gold] to deal an extra {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA-CONCENTRATED_FIRE.title: Concentrated Fire
MANOSABA-HOTPOT.title: Hot Pot
MANOSABA-BOULDERS.title: Boulders
MANOSABA-SUICIDE.title: Seppuku to Heaven
MANOSABA-SUICIDE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to yourself and gain {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-ALIBI.title: Alibi
MANOSABA-SIMPLE_SPEAR.title: Simple Spear
MANOSABA-ELECTROCUTION.title: Electrocution
MANOSABA-WITCHES_SABBATH.title: Witches' Sabbath
MANOSABA-WITCHES_SABBATH.description:
Requires {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold] to play.
Consume all [gold]Majoka[/gold] and [gold]Suspicion[/gold] to deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies, and increase damage based on [gold]Suspicion[/gold] spent. This attack cannot be blocked.
MANOSABA-EMA_NIKAIDO_HIRO.title: 💢Sakuraba Ema💢
MANOSABA-BATHROOM_TALK.title: Bathroom Talk
MANOSABA-BULLSEYE.title: Bullseye
MANOSABA-DRIFT_APART.title: Drift Apart
MANOSABA-FORGE_SPEAR.title: Forge Spear
MANOSABA-FORGE_SPEAR.description:
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} each of [gold]Arrow[/gold], [gold]Rapier[/gold], [gold]Ribbon[/gold], and [gold]Broom[/gold] into your draw pile.
When drawing, if your hand contains [gold]Arrow[/gold], [gold]Rapier[/gold], [gold]Ribbon[/gold], or [gold]Broom[/gold], consume one and gain a [gold]Simple Spear[/gold].
MANOSABA-S_S_ARROW.title: Arrows
MANOSABA-S_S_RAPIER.title: Rapier
MANOSABA-S_S_RIBBON.title: Ribbon
MANOSABA-S_S_BROOM.title: Broom
MANOSABA-S_S_BROOM.description: Can't fly—it's just an ordinary broom.
MANOSABA-BAD_END.title: Bad End
MANOSABA-BAD_END.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, take {Damage:diff()} damage. Why is every choice a bad end?
MANOSABA-HOUSE_KEEPING.title: Housekeeping
MANOSABA-HOUSE_KEEPING.description: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] at the end of your turn.
MANOSABA-INTIMIDATE.title: Intimidate
MANOSABA-INTIMIDATE.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to a target and gain {VotePower:diff()} [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-PAIN_KILLER.title: Painkiller
MANOSABA-MIX_POTIONS.title: Potion Mix
MANOSABA-MIX_POTIONS.description:
Consume carried potions to craft higher-tier potions. Repeat {CraftCount:diff()} time(s).
Each time you play this card, you have {CatalystChance:diff()}% chance to gain a [gold]Catalyst[/gold].
MANOSABA-AUTOMATED_POTION_MIX.title: Automated Potion Mix
MANOSABA-GRAND_HEAL.title: Grand Heal
MANOSABA-GRAND_HEAL.description: Heal all players {Heal:diff()} HP and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards. Based on [gold]Majoka[/gold], grant all allies {InhibitionPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Inhibition[/gold] (max 5 stacks).
MANOSABA-WITCHES_CAULDRON.title: Witch's Cauldron
MANOSABA-WITCHES_CAULDRON.description: Consume carried potions to craft higher-tier potions. Repeat until no more crafting is possible. Each time you play this card, gain a [gold]Catalyst[/gold].
MANOSABA-SHOTS_FIRED.title: Shots Fired
MANOSABA-SHOTS_FIRED.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Super effective against Nahoka.
MANOSABA-COLLECT_DATA.title: Data Collection
MANOSABA-COLLECT_POTIONS.title: Potion Haul
MANOSABA-DRUG_DEALER.title: Drug Dealer
MANOSABA-DRUG_DEALER.description:
Each ally gains 1 random basic potion.{IfUpgraded:show:
50% chance to gain 1 [gold]Catalyst[/gold].}
MANOSABA-POTION_FACTORY.title: Potion Factory
MANOSABA-MERURU_INFIRMARY.title: Meruru Infirmary
MANOSABA-MERURU_INFIRMARY.description: Gain {MeruruInfirmaryPower:diff()} [gold]Meruru Infirmary[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:\nApply this to all allies instead.}
MANOSABA-QUICK_HEAL.title: Quick Heal
MANOSABA-QUICK_HEAL.description: Heal all players {Heal:diff()} HP and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
MANOSABA-IMMOLATION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MANOSABA-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.title: Fortune Telling
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile to add to your hand.
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.selectionScreen: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to add to your hand.
MANOSABA-GUILLOTINE.title: Guillotine
MANOSABA-GUILLOTINE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target monster is below {BeheadedThreshold:diff()}% HP, it dies instantly.
MANOSABA-WALL.title: Wall
MANOSABA-PRISON.title: Witch Island Prison
MANOSABA-WORLD_VANQUISHER.title: World Vanquisher
MANOSABA-WORLD_VANQUISHER.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At end of turn, if total [gold]Majoka[/gold] in combat is greater than [gold]players[/gold] x {MajokaPower}, this card auto-plays from your deck and you win.
MANOSABA-EMA_DOG_ATTACK.title: Ema, Attack!
MANOSABA-EMA_DOG_ATTACK.description: Give your [gold]Sakuraba Ema?[/gold] the [gold]Ema, Attack![/gold] power.
MANOSABA-HIKAMI_MERURU_EXAID.title: Hi↗ka↘mi↗ Me↘ru↗ru
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUZZLE.title: Nanoka Puzzle
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUZZLE.description: Exhaust your entire hand. Transform your [gold]draw pile[/gold] into {NanokaPieces:diff()} [gold]Nanoka Piece[/gold], then add 1 each of [gold]Nanoka Head[/gold], [gold]Nanoka Right Arm[/gold], [gold]Nanoka Right Leg[/gold], [gold]Nanoka Left Arm[/gold], and [gold]Nanoka Left Leg[/gold].
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PIECE.title: Nanoka Piece
MANOSABA-NANOKA_HEAD.title: Nanoka Head
MANOSABA-NANOKA_RIGHT_ARM.title: Nanoka Right Arm
MANOSABA-NANOKA_RIGHT_LEG.title: Nanoka Right Leg
MANOSABA-NANOKA_LEFT_ARM.title: Nanoka Left Arm
MANOSABA-NANOKA_LEFT_LEG.title: Nanoka Left Leg
MANOSABA-NANOKA_COMPLETE.title: Nanoka Complete
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE.title: Lovers' Pact
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE.description: You and the target each gain {DoubleSuicidePower:diff()} [gold]Lovers' Pact[/gold].
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION.title: Liquid Manipulation
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION.description: Based on [gold]Majoka[/gold], grant all allies {LiquidManipulationPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Liquid Manipulation[/gold] (max 20 stacks).
MANOSABA-CONFUSION.title: Confusion
MANOSABA-COMPLEMENTARY_COLOR.title: Complementary Color
MANOSABA-COMPLEMENTARY_COLOR.description: Channel the complementary paint orb of the last orb in your orb list.{IfUpgraded:show:\nThen do this for the second-last orb as well.}
MANOSABA-COLOR_MIX.title: Color Mix
MANOSABA-COLOR_MIX.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least 3 different paint orb colors, gain +5 damage; at 4 colors, +10; at 5, +25; at 6, +45.
MANOSABA-COLOR_BLAST.title: Color Blast
MANOSABA-COLOR_BLAST.description: [gold]Evoke[/gold] all paint orbs, then randomly generate paint orbs based on the number [gold]Evoked[/gold].
MANOSABA-JUDGE_JOGASAKI_NOAH.title: Judge
MANOSABA-JUDGE_JOGASAKI_NOAH.description: Add a random [gold]Judgment[/gold] card to another player's hand. If Nikaido Hiro is present, prioritize her.
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_A.title: Bad Draw A
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_A.description: If played on [gold]Jogasaki Noah[/gold], she gains 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the other two [gold]Bad Draw[/gold] cards.
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_B.title: Bad Draw B
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_B.description: If played on [gold]Jogasaki Noah[/gold], she gains 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the other two [gold]Bad Draw[/gold] cards.
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_C.title: Bad Draw C
MANOSABA-BAD_DRAW_C.description: If played on [gold]Jogasaki Noah[/gold], she gains 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the other two [gold]Bad Draw[/gold] cards.
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT.title: Space Out
MANOSABA-INK_PAINTING.title: Ink Painting
MANOSABA-INK_PAINTING.description: Choose 1 from [gold]Black Paint Orb[/gold] and [gold]White Paint Orb[/gold], then play it. Repeat {Repeat:diff()} time(s).
MANOSABA-ORB_FULL_SPECTRUM_TEST.title: Orb Full Spectrum Test
MANOSABA-ORB_FULL_SPECTRUM_TEST.descript:
Gain 2 [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].
Channel 1 each of [gold]Red[/gold], [gold]Orange[/gold], [gold]Yellow[/gold], [gold]Green[/gold], [gold]Blue[/gold], [gold]Purple[/gold], [gold]Black[/gold], and [gold]White Paint Orb[/gold].
MANOSABA-STRIKE_TACHIBANA_SHERRY.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_TACHIBANA_SHERRY.title: Defend
MANOSABA-LEFT_PUNCH.title: Left Punch
MANOSABA-RIGHT_PUNCH.title: Right Punch
MANOSABA-RIGHT_PUNCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_PUNCH.title: Double Punch
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT.title: Quick Wit
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT.description: What kind of miracle will happen?
MANOSABA-WHAT_DO_YOU_MEAN.title: What's That Mean?
MANOSABA-WHAT_DO_YOU_MEAN.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Consume 1 card from your hand.
MANOSABA-BIG_INVESTIGATION.title: Big Investigation
MANOSABA-DONT_RUSH.title: Don't Rush
MANOSABA-DONT_RUSH.description:
An enemy loses 5 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-YOU_ARE_THIS.title: You're the One
MANOSABA-CROSSBOW.title: Crossbow
MANOSABA-CROSSBOW.description:
Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Broken Crossbow+|Broken Crossbow}[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-BROKEN_LOCK.title: Broken Lock
MANOSABA-BROKEN_CROSSBOW.title: Broken Crossbow
MANOSABA-MASTER_KEY.title: Master Key
MANOSABA-MASTER_KEY.description:
Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Broken Lock+|Broken Lock}[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-BURN_THE_HOUSE_DOWN.title: Burn the House Down
MANOSABA-BURN_THE_HOUSE_DOWN.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold], increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
MANOSABA-UNSTEADY_LEGS.title: Unsteady Legs
MANOSABA-IGNITE.title: Ignite
MANOSABA-IGNITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {VotePower} [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL.title: Hanging Kill
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All Hanging Kill cards deal double damage to this enemy.
Gain {VotePower} [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-DIRTY_EHE.title: Got Dirty, Ehehe✰
MANOSABA-SLEEPING_PILL.title: Sleeping Pill
MANOSABA-YUKI_BACKFLIP.title: Backflip
MANOSABA-ACHUBA.title: Arm Wrestling
MANOSABA-ACHUBA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Whenever this kills an enemy, repeat this effect.
Cannot damage enemies with [gold]Soar[/gold].
MANOSABA-ISEKAI_ELEVATOR.title: Isekai Elevator
MANOSABA-ISEKAI_ELEVATOR.description:
An ally gains {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
You gain {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
Take {Damage} damage.
MANOSABA-ICE_CUBE.title: Ice Cube
MANOSABA-ICE_CUBE.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ice Ball[/gold] to your hand.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-ICE_BALL.title: Ice Ball
MANOSABA-ICE_BALL.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each [gold]Ice Ball[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold], increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND.title: Lifelong Friend
MANOSABA-GIVE_IT_A_TRY.title: Give It a Try
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME.title: Date Time
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME.description:
If you have no [gold]Majoka[/gold], heal {Heal:diff()} HP, plus 1 additional HP for each point of [gold]Strength[/gold] you have.
You cannot gain [gold]Majoka[/gold] this turn.
MANOSABA-SUPER_PUNCH.title: Epic Iron Fist
MANOSABA-SUPER_PUNCH.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
If you have at least 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-STRIKE_SAEKI_MIRIA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_SAEKI_MIRIA.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SAEKI_MIRIA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-MIND_SHARING.title: Mind Sharing
MANOSABA-MIND_SHARING.description: All allies gain most of each ally's current abilities.
MANOSABA-EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
MANOSABA-EXCHANGE.description:
Choose a player.
Add 1 random card of that character to your hand.
That player adds 1 random Miria card to their hand.
Cards gained this way have [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and [gold]Void[/gold]. If you have no teammates, draw 1 card and exhaust it instead.{IfUpgraded:show:
Can receive rare cards this way. | cards received are uncommon or below.}
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SHARING.title: Trauma Sharing
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SHARING.description: Transfer the negative status effects from one enemy to all enemies.
MANOSABA-SNS_EXCHANGE.title: Exchange Contacts
MANOSABA-EVIDENCE_LOOTING.title: Collect Evidence
MANOSABA-SCAPE_GOAT.title: Scapegoat
MANOSABA-SCAPE_GOAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Take this turn's enemy damage for one player.
MANOSABA-OBJECTION.title: Objection!
MANOSABA-OBJECTION.description:
For each stack of [gold]Suspicion[/gold],
deal {Damage:diff()} damage to one enemy.
Remove all [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-FRIENDLY.title: Affinity
MANOSABA-FRIENDLY.description: Reduce damage taken from attacks by 20%.
MANOSABA-CLEAN_UP.title: Clean Up
MANOSABA-CLEAN_UP.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card. At the start of next turn,
draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MANOSABA-MEMORY_SHARING.title: Memory Sharing
MANOSABA-MEMORY_SHARING.description:
At the start of each turn, all characters gain 1 card from another character.
The pool of possible cards changes based on Miria's [gold]Majoka[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:
Cards gained this way are upgraded.}
MANOSABA-CLUMSY.title: Clumsy
MANOSABA-FALL_GUY.title: Fall Guy
MANOSABA-DYING_MESSAGE.title: Dying Message
MANOSABA-DYING_MESSAGE.description: If you die this turn, next turn all allies draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-LAW_KNOWER.title: Law Knower
MANOSABA-LAW_KNOWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Suspicion[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the amount gained x {Block:diff()}.
MANOSABA-PREPARE.title: Prepare
MANOSABA-PREPARE.description: Discard 2 cards. At the start of next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-KEY_EVIDENCE.title: Key Evidence
MANOSABA-KEY_EVIDENCE.description:
For each stack of [gold]Suspicion[/gold],
deal {Damage:diff()} damage to one enemy.
Remove all of your [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-OPENING_STATEMENT.title: Opening Statement
MANOSABA-UNJUST_SENTENCE.title: Unjust Sentence
MANOSABA-UNJUST_SENTENCE.description: This enemy takes double attack damage this turn.
MANOSABA-BOMB_DEFUSAL_MASTER.title: Bomb Defusal Master
MANOSABA-MIRIA_PROTECT.title: Miria Protect
MANOSABA-MIRIA_PROTECT.description:
Give an ally {BaseBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For each stack of [gold]Suspicion[/gold] they have, that ally gains {Block:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {VotePower} [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-PEACEMAKER.title: Peacemaker
MANOSABA-SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
MANOSABA-UNCLE_WRITING.title: Uncle Writing
MANOSABA-ACTION_MOVIE.title: Action Movie
MANOSABA-ROMANTIC_MOVIE.title: Romantic Movie
MANOSABA-COMEDY_MOVIE.title: Comedy Movie
MANOSABA-HORROR_MOVIE.title: Horror Movie
MANOSABA-FANTASY_MOVIE.title: Fantasy Movie
MANOSABA-SPY_MOVIE.title: Spy Movie
MANOSABA-STRIKE_TONO_HANNA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_TONO_HANNA.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_TONO_HANNA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-SEWING.title: Sewing
MANOSABA-SEWING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:Upgrade all cards with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag in your hand.|Choose a card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag in your hand and upgrade it.}
MANOSABA-THRIFTY.title: Thrifty
MANOSABA-THRIFTY.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards in your hand. Gain {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way.
MANOSABA-FLYING_BROOM.title: Flying Broom
MANOSABA-FLYING_BROOM.description: You and another player gain [gold]Soar[/gold] until the start of your next turn.
MANOSABA-REFUSE_MAJO.title: I Don't Want to Be a Witch
MANOSABA-REFUSE_MAJO.description: Can only be played while you have fewer than 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold]. Transform all [gold]Attack[/gold] cards in your hand into 0-cost and with exhaust [gold]Boulders[/gold]. Transform all other cards in your hand into [gold]Wound[/gold]. Lose all [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-PERFORMANCE_DRESS.title: Performance Dress
MANOSABA-ICE_STRIKE.title: Ice Strike
MANOSABA-ICE_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gains bonus damage for each stack of your [gold]Puppet Collection[/gold] ({IfUpgraded:show:6|5} per stack).
MANOSABA-BORROWED_KNIFE.title: Borrowed Blade
MANOSABA-BORROWED_KNIFE.description: Another player draws {Cards:diff()} cards and gains {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-SKY_ISLAND.title: Sky Island
MANOSABA-SKY_ISLAND.description: Based on [gold]Majoka[/gold], deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies X times (max {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage).
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET.title: Ema Puppet
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET.description: Whenever you play a card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
MANOSABA-HIRO_PUPPET.title: Hiro Puppet
MANOSABA-HIRO_PUPPET.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Wound[/gold] to your hand.
MANOSABA-AN_AN_PUPPET.title: AnAn Puppet
MANOSABA-NOAH_PUPPET.title: Noah Puppet
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET.title: Leia Puppet
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET.description: At end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} gold.
MANOSABA-MIRIA_PUPPET.title: Miria Puppet
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET.title: Margo Puppet
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET.description: At the start of your turn, move a random [gold]Puppet[/gold] card from your discard pile to your hand.
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUPPET.title: Nanoka Puppet
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUPPET.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag, gain {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA-ALISA_PUPPET.title: Alisa Puppet
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET.title: Sherry Puppet
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET.description: This turn, your next Attack card is played one extra time.
MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET.title: Hanna Puppet
MANOSABA-COCO_PUPPET.title: Coco Puppet
MANOSABA-COCO_PUPPET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of next turn, gain the same amount of [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.title: Meruru Puppet
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] and add it to your [gold]hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to add to your hand.
MANOSABA-PUPPET_FELL_TEST.title: Puppet Fell Test
MANOSABA-THE_FOOL.title: The Fool
MANOSABA-THE_FOOL.description: Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, then Coco takes over for you.
MANOSABA-THE_MAGICIAN.title: The Magician
MANOSABA-THE_MAGICIAN.description: Gain [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to 5 times the number of [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards in your deck.
MANOSABA-THE_HIGH_PRIESTESS.title: The High Priestess
MANOSABA-THE_HIGH_PRIESTESS.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards in your hand. Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card exhausted this way.
MANOSABA-THE_EMPRESS.title: The Empress
MANOSABA-THE_EMPRESS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to an enemy. Heal for 50% of damage dealt. If [gold]The Emperor[/gold] is in your deck, double this damage.
MANOSABA-THE_EMPEROR.title: The Emperor
MANOSABA-THE_EMPEROR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to an enemy. If [gold]The Empress[/gold] is in your deck, double this damage.
MANOSABA-THE_HIEROPHANT.title: The Hierophant
MANOSABA-THE_HIEROPHANT.description:
Remove all [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
Apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
For each stack of [gold]Suspicion[/gold] removed, apply an additional 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_LOVERS.title: The Lovers
MANOSABA-THE_LOVERS.description:
Apply {TheLoversPower:diff()} [gold]The Lovers[/gold] to an enemy.
When an enemy with [gold]The Lovers[/gold] is attacked, heal the applier for [blue]{TheLoversPower}%[/blue] of damage dealt.
MANOSABA-THE_CHARIOT.title: The Chariot
MANOSABA-THE_CHARIOT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
MANOSABA-STRENGTH.title: Strength
MANOSABA-THE_HERMIT.title: The Hermit
MANOSABA-WHEEL_OF_FORTUNE.title: Wheel of Fortune
MANOSABA-WHEEL_OF_FORTUNE.description:
Shuffle all cards in your hand into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
MANOSABA-JUSTICE.title: Justice
MANOSABA-JUSTICE.description:
Sum all enemies' lost HP, then redistribute it evenly.
{IfUpgraded:show:Also applies to allies, calculated separately.}
MANOSABA-THE_HANGED_MAN.title: The Hanged Man
MANOSABA-DEATH.title: Death
MANOSABA-TEMPERANCE.title: Temperance
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL.title: The Devil
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL.description:
Choose 1 of the following 3 cards and play it:
[gold]Eye of No Escape[/gold], [gold]Awakened Madness Power[/gold], [gold]Bestow Trial[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_EYE_OF_NO_ESCAPE_TOKE:
Apply {EyeOfNoEscapePower:diff()} turns of [gold]Eye of No Escape[/gold] to all players and enemies.
At end of turn, gain 20 [gold]Madness[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_AWAKENED_MADNESS_POWE:
Apply {AwakenedMadnessPower:diff()} turns of [gold]Awakened Madness Power[/gold] to all players and enemies.
All unblocked attacks apply [gold]Madness[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_BESTOW_TRIAL_TOKEN.de: Set all players and enemies to 50% of their max HP.
MANOSABA-THE_TOWER.title: The Tower
MANOSABA-THE_TOWER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, remove their [gold]Artifact[/gold], then apply 1 [gold]Tower[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_STAR.title: The Star
MANOSABA-THE_STAR.description:
Gain 10 [gold]Block[/gold].
This turn, take damage for all teammates.
For each additional teammate, gain +{InterceptPower:diff()} damage reduction.
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], double this damage reduction.
MANOSABA-THE_MOON.title: The Moon
MANOSABA-THE_MOON.description:
Deal damage equal to {IfUpgraded:show:75|50}% of the target's total [gold]Poison[/gold], [gold]Doom[/gold], and [gold]Burn[/gold] stacks.
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], double this damage.
MANOSABA-THE_SUN.title: The Sun
MANOSABA-THE_SUN.description:
Gain {TheSunPower:diff()} [gold]The Sun[/gold] (+1 max [gold]Energy[/gold]).
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], apply this to all allies instead.
MANOSABA-JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
MANOSABA-JUDGEMENT.description:
Remove all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from yourself.
Gain [gold]Energy[/gold] equal to the number of effects removed.
If your deck contains [gold]The Hierophant[/gold], [gold]The High Priestess[/gold], and [gold]Justice[/gold], this [gold]Energy[/gold] gain is doubled.
MANOSABA-THE_WORLD.title: The World
MANOSABA-THE_WORLD.description: Can only be played when your draw pile is empty. Win the combat when played.
MANOSABA-MOVIE_VIEWING.title: Movie Viewing
MANOSABA-MOVIE_VIEWING.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random Movie card(s) to your hand.
MANOSABA-MOVIE_NOISE.title: Movie Noise
MANOSABA-MOVIE_NOISE.description: Whenever you play a Movie card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
MANOSABA-ASPIRATION.title: Aspiration
MANOSABA-ASPIRATION.description: All teammates gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold].
